modules.name: Airtable
modules.description: Airtable API - Bases, Tables, Records operations with search and aggregation

tools.name: list_bases
tools.description: List all accessible Airtable bases with their names, IDs, and permission levels

tools.name: describe
tools.description: Describe Airtable base or table schema. Use detailLevel to optimize context: tableIdentifiersOnly (minimal), identifiersOnly (IDs and names), full (complete details with field types)

tools.name: query
tools.description: Query Airtable records with filtering, sorting, and pagination

tools.name: get_record
tools.description: Retrieve a single record by ID

tools.name: create
tools.description: Create new records in a table. Supports batch creation (up to 10 records per request)

tools.name: update
tools.description: Update existing records. Supports batch update (up to 10 records per request). Uses PATCH (partial update)

tools.name: delete
tools.description: Delete records from a table. Supports batch deletion (up to 10 records per request)

tools.name: search_records
tools.description: Search for records containing specific text across specified fields or all text fields

tools.name: aggregate_records
tools.description: Perform aggregation operations (sum, count, avg, min, max) on records with optional grouping

tools.name: create_table
tools.description: Create a new table in a base with specified fields

tools.name: update_table
tools.description: Update table metadata (name and/or description)

modules.name: Confluence
modules.description: Confluence API - Wiki operations (Space, Page, Search, Comment, Label)

tools.name: list_spaces
tools.description: List all Confluence spaces accessible to the current user.

tools.name: get_space
tools.description: Get details of a specific Confluence space by ID or key.

tools.name: get_pages
tools.description: List pages in a Confluence space.

tools.name: get_page
tools.description: Get a Confluence page by ID with its content.

tools.name: create_page
tools.description: Create a new Confluence page.

tools.name: update_page
tools.description: Update an existing Confluence page.

tools.name: delete_page
tools.description: Delete a Confluence page.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search Confluence content using CQL (Confluence Query Language). Example: 'type=page AND space=MYSPACE AND text~"keyword"'

tools.name: get_page_comments
tools.description: Get comments on a Confluence page.

tools.name: add_page_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to a Confluence page.

tools.name: get_page_labels
tools.description: Get labels on a Confluence page.

tools.name: add_page_label
tools.description: Add a label to a Confluence page.

modules.name: GitHub
modules.description: GitHub API - Repository, Issue, PR, Actions, and Search operations

tools.name: get_user
tools.description: Get information about the authenticated GitHub user.

tools.name: list_repos
tools.description: List repositories for the authenticated user.

tools.name: get_repo
tools.description: Get details of a specific repository.

tools.name: list_branches
tools.description: List branches in a repository.

tools.name: list_commits
tools.description: List commits in a repository.

tools.name: get_file_content
tools.description: Get the content of a file in a repository.

tools.name: list_issues
tools.description: List issues in a repository.

tools.name: get_issue
tools.description: Get details of a specific issue.

tools.name: create_issue
tools.description: Create a new issue in a repository.

tools.name: update_issue
tools.description: Update an existing issue.

tools.name: add_issue_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to an issue.

tools.name: list_prs
tools.description: List pull requests in a repository.

tools.name: get_pr
tools.description: Get details of a specific pull request.

tools.name: create_pr
tools.description: Create a new pull request.

tools.name: list_pr_files
tools.description: List files changed in a pull request.

tools.name: search_repos
tools.description: Search for repositories.

tools.name: search_code
tools.description: Search for code across repositories.

tools.name: search_issues
tools.description: Search for issues and pull requests.

tools.name: list_workflows
tools.description: List workflows in a repository.

tools.name: list_workflow_runs
tools.description: List workflow runs in a repository.

modules.name: Google Calendar
modules.description: Google Calendar API - List, create, update, and delete events

tools.name: list_calendars
tools.description: List all calendars accessible to the user.

tools.name: get_calendar
tools.description: Get details of a specific calendar.

tools.name: list_events
tools.description: List events from a calendar within a time range.

tools.name: get_event
tools.description: Get details of a specific event.

tools.name: create_event
tools.description: Create a new event in a calendar.

tools.name: update_event
tools.description: Update an existing event.

tools.name: delete_event
tools.description: Delete an event from a calendar.

tools.name: quick_add
tools.description: Create an event based on a simple text string (e.g., 'Meeting with John tomorrow at 3pm').

modules.name: Jira
modules.description: Jira API - Issue/Project operations (search, create, update, comment, transition)

tools.name: get_myself
tools.description: Get information about the current Jira user (myself).

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List all Jira projects accessible to the current user.

tools.name: get_project
tools.description: Get details of a specific Jira project.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search for Jira issues using JQL (Jira Query Language). Example JQL: 'project = PROJ AND status = "In Progress"'

tools.name: get_issue
tools.description: Get details of a specific Jira issue by key or ID.

tools.name: create_issue
tools.description: Create a new Jira issue.

tools.name: update_issue
tools.description: Update an existing Jira issue.

tools.name: get_transitions
tools.description: Get available transitions for an issue. Use this to find valid transition IDs before changing issue status.

tools.name: transition_issue
tools.description: Transition an issue to a new status. Use get_transitions first to get valid transition IDs.

tools.name: get_comments
tools.description: Get comments on a Jira issue.

tools.name: add_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to a Jira issue.

modules.name: Microsoft To Do
modules.description: Microsoft To Do API - List, create, update, and delete tasks and task lists

tools.name: list_lists
tools.description: Get all task lists for the user.

tools.name: get_list
tools.description: Get a specific task list by ID.

tools.name: create_list
tools.description: Create a new task list.

tools.name: update_list
tools.description: Update an existing task list.

tools.name: delete_list
tools.description: Delete a task list.

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: Get all tasks in a task list.

tools.name: get_task
tools.description: Get a specific task by ID.

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create a new task in a task list.

tools.name: update_task
tools.description: Update an existing task.

tools.name: complete_task
tools.description: Mark a task as completed.

tools.name: delete_task
tools.description: Delete a task.

modules.name: Notion
modules.description: Notion API - Page, Database, Block, Comment, and User operations

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search pages and databases in Notion by title. Returns pages and databases shared with the integration.

tools.name: get_page
tools.description: Retrieve a Notion page by ID. Returns page properties and metadata.

tools.name: get_page_content
tools.description: Get the content (blocks) of a Notion page. Use this to read the actual text content.

tools.name: create_page
tools.description: Create a new page in Notion. Can create as a child of another page or in a database.

tools.name: update_page
tools.description: Update a Notion page's properties.

tools.name: get_database
tools.description: Retrieve a Notion database schema and metadata.

tools.name: query_database
tools.description: Query a Notion database with optional filters and sorts. Returns pages in the database.

tools.name: append_blocks
tools.description: Append content blocks to a page or block. Use to add text, headings, lists, etc.

tools.name: delete_block
tools.description: Delete a block from Notion. This also deletes all children of the block.

tools.name: list_comments
tools.description: List comments on a Notion page or block.

tools.name: add_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to a Notion page.

tools.name: list_users
tools.description: List all users in the Notion workspace.

tools.name: get_user
tools.description: Get information about a Notion user.

tools.name: get_bot_user
tools.description: Get information about the current integration bot user.

modules.name: Supabase
modules.description: Supabase Management API - Project management, DB operations, Migrations, Logs, and Storage

tools.name: list_organizations
tools.description: List all organizations you have access to.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List all Supabase projects you have access to. Use this first to get project_ref for other operations.

tools.name: get_project
tools.description: Get details of a specific project.

tools.name: list_tables
tools.description: List all tables in the database with their schemas. Returns table names and column counts.

tools.name: run_query
tools.description: Execute a SQL query against the database. Supports both read and write operations.

tools.name: list_migrations
tools.description: List all database migrations that have been applied.

tools.name: apply_migration
tools.description: Apply a new database migration. Use for DDL operations like CREATE TABLE, ALTER TABLE, etc.

tools.name: get_logs
tools.description: Get logs for a specific service. Available services: api, postgres, edge-function, auth, storage, realtime.

tools.name: get_security_advisors
tools.description: Get security recommendations and potential issues for the project.

tools.name: get_performance_advisors
tools.description: Get performance recommendations and potential issues for the project.

tools.name: get_project_url
tools.description: Get the base URL for a Supabase project.

tools.name: get_api_keys
tools.description: Get the API keys for the project (anon key and service role key).

tools.name: generate_typescript_types
tools.description: Generate TypeScript type definitions from the database schema.

tools.name: list_edge_functions
tools.description: List all Edge Functions deployed in the project.

tools.name: get_edge_function
tools.description: Get details of a specific Edge Function.

tools.name: list_storage_buckets
tools.description: List all storage buckets in the project.

tools.name: get_storage_config
tools.description: Get storage configuration for the project including file size limits and features.
